_schema.category: one of: photoreal_portrait, typography, compositional_spatial, multi_subject, style_artistic, long_prompt, knowledge_facts, counting_numerical, negative_space, edge_case_policy, multilingual, hyper_complex
_schema.prompt: the text prompt sent to the model verbatim
_schema.eval_focus: list of attributes the judge should pay attention to
_schema.vqa_questions: list of yes/no questions for VQAScore
_schema.negative_prompt: optional; sent to models that accept it
_schema.has_text_to_render: bool; true if the prompt asks for in-image text

_metadata.author: Mesh Dollar per Image Bench v1
_metadata.notes: Original prompts written from scratch. Structural inspiration from PartiPrompts, DrawBench, GenAI-Bench, and HEIM's multilingual aspect; no text copied. 120 prompts across 12 categories, 10 per category. Category 11 (multilingual) probes non-Latin script rendering AND cultural-context fidelity together. Category 12 (hyper_complex) is the boss-fight tier: 10+ named subjects per prompt, exact positional constraints, multi-stylistic composition, counting, text, and scene-knowledge all simultaneously — designed to expose where premium-tier models earn their bill.

items.prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a 70-year-old woman with silver hair tied in a low bun, warm hazel eyes with visible crows feet, soft golden hour light from camera left, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, neutral gray backdrop.
vqa_questions: Is the person elderly?
Does the person have silver hair?
Is the hair in a bun?
Is the lighting warm and directional?
Is the background a neutral gray?

items.prompt: Close-up portrait of a young Black man with a neatly trimmed beard, wearing round wire-frame glasses, laughing genuinely, even studio softbox lighting from front and slightly above, plain white background.
vqa_questions: Is the man young?
Does he have a trimmed beard?
Is he wearing round glasses?
Is he laughing?
Is the background plain white?

items.prompt: A portrait of a tired night-shift nurse in pale blue scrubs sitting on a hospital break room couch, harsh fluorescent overhead light, dark circles under her eyes, holding a paper coffee cup with both hands, photorealistic.
vqa_questions: Is the person wearing pale blue scrubs?
Does she look tired?
Is the lighting harsh and fluorescent?
Is she holding a coffee cup with both hands?

items.prompt: A child's hand resting on an open book, age approximately 8, fingernails slightly dirty from playing outside, late afternoon side light, photorealistic, anatomically correct fingers and proportions.
eval_focus: five visible fingers in correct anatomy
vqa_questions: Is a child's hand visible?
Is the hand resting on a book?
Are exactly five fingers visible on the hand?
Are the fingers anatomically correct?

items.prompt: Full-body portrait of a ballet dancer mid-pirouette in a sunlit studio, wooden floor, mirrored back wall reflecting her motion, white practice tutu, motion blur on the skirt only, sharp focus on the face.
vqa_questions: Is the person a ballet dancer?
Are they spinning?
Is there a wooden floor?
Is there a mirrored wall behind?
Is the tutu white?

items.prompt: Two elderly best friends sitting on a park bench laughing, one wearing a maroon cardigan, the other in a forest green windbreaker, autumn leaves on the ground, soft overcast lighting, photorealistic.
vqa_questions: Are there two elderly people?
Are they on a park bench?
Are they laughing?
Is one wearing maroon?
Is one wearing forest green?
Are there autumn leaves on the ground?

items.prompt: A construction worker on a steel beam high above a city skyline at sunrise, safety harness clipped, holding a thermos in one hand and a rolled blueprint in the other, dramatic golden light, photorealistic.

Are they on a steel beam?
Is the city skyline visible?
Is the lighting golden?

Is a blueprint visible?

items.prompt: A South Asian bride in traditional red and gold lehenga, intricate henna on both hands clearly visible palms-up, gold jewelry, soft window light from the right, sitting on a low cushion, photorealistic.

Is henna visible on her hands?
Are her palms facing up?
Is the lighting from the right?
Is she seated low?

items.prompt: A fisherman in his 60s wearing a bright yellow rain jacket, gray stubble beard, weathered tan skin, stormy ocean spray in the background, holding a wooden ship wheel with both hands, photorealistic.

vqa_questions: Is the person elderly?
Is the jacket yellow?
Does he have a gray stubble beard?
Is there a stormy ocean behind?

items.prompt: A musician playing a cello in a candlelit room, eyes closed in concentration, bow held correctly in the right hand, instrument resting between the knees, warm orange tones, photorealistic anatomy of both hands.

Are their eyes closed?
Is the lighting warm and candle-lit?
Is the bow in their right hand?
Are the hands anatomically correct?

Does it mention 'I hope this finds you well'?
Does it mention 'The garden is in full bloom this June'?

Is the paper yellowed?

items.prompt: A wide pier extending into a calm lake; a small wooden rowboat tied to the very end of the pier (far from the camera); a single seagull flying directly above the rowboat; dawn light.

items.prompt: A father and his young daughter (age ~5) baking together in a kitchen: the father is wearing a navy apron and kneading dough, the daughter is wearing a striped pink-and-white apron and holding a wooden spoon, flour dusted on the counter, warm kitchen light.

items.prompt: A watercolor painting of a small wooden cottage in a snowy pine forest at dusk, soft pink and lavender sky, warm yellow window light, loose brushwork visible, paper grain visible, no photorealism.

items.prompt: An anime-style illustration of a teenage girl with long teal hair standing on a Tokyo rooftop at sunset, cherry blossom petals blowing past, in the style of a 2000s magical girl anime, cell-shaded with thick black lineart.

items.prompt: A 1970s polaroid photograph of three friends at a beach bonfire, slight color shift toward warm orange, visible film grain, mild light leak on the right edge, white polaroid border, late evening.
vqa_questions: Does this look like a vintage polaroid?

Are there three people at a bonfire?

items.prompt: An oil painting in the style of late-19th-century Impressionism: a Parisian café terrace at midday, visible brushstrokes, soft color blending, dappled light through nearby trees, no sharp edges.
vqa_questions: Does this look like an Impressionist oil painting?
Are brushstrokes clearly visible?
Is the subject a café terrace?
Is there dappled light?

items.prompt: A flat vector illustration in the style of a 1950s mid-century children's book: a friendly red fox tipping its hat to a small mouse, limited color palette of red, cream, mustard, and forest green, screen-print texture overlay.
vqa_questions: Does this look like a flat vector illustration?
Does it have a mid-century children's book feel?
Is there a fox and a mouse?
Is the fox tipping a hat?
Is the color palette limited and earthy?

items.prompt: A black-and-white charcoal drawing of an old fisherman mending nets on a dock, heavy shadows, paper texture, smudge marks visible, no color, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting.
vqa_questions: Is this a black-and-white charcoal drawing?
Are smudges and paper texture visible?
Is there a fisherman mending nets?
Is the lighting dramatic with heavy shadows?

items.prompt: A pixel art scene in the style of an early-90s SNES JRPG: a small hero in green tunic standing at the entrance of a forest, 32-bit color palette, visible chunky pixels, slight CRT scanline overlay.
eval_focus: hero in green tunic at forest entrance
vqa_questions: Does this look like SNES-era pixel art?
Are individual pixels clearly visible?
Is there a small character in a green tunic?
Is there a forest entrance?
Is there a CRT scanline overlay?

items.prompt: An art deco travel poster of a 1930s ocean liner cutting through waves at dawn, stylized geometric clouds, golden sun rays, limited palette of cream, navy, gold, and coral, strong vertical lines, illustrated not photographic.
eval_focus: limited palette cream navy gold coral
vqa_questions: Does this look like an art deco poster?
Is the ocean liner geometrically stylized?
Is the palette cream, navy, gold and coral?
Is this illustration, not a photo?

items.prompt: A stained glass window depicting a medieval knight kneeling before a queen, deep cobalt blues, rich reds, and emerald greens divided by heavy black lead lines, sunlight backlighting the glass, gothic arch frame.
vqa_questions: Does this look like stained glass?
Are there visible heavy black lead lines?
Is the palette cobalt, red, and emerald?
Is there a knight kneeling before a queen?
Is there a gothic arch frame?

items.prompt: An ukiyo-e woodblock print in the style of Hokusai: a great wave curling over a small fishing boat with Mount Fuji in the distance, flat color planes, no shading, characteristic blue and white wave foam.
vqa_questions: Does this look like a Japanese woodblock print?
Is there a large curling wave?
Is there a small boat?
Is Mount Fuji visible in the distance?
Are there flat color planes with no shading?

items.prompt: A photorealistic wide-angle interior shot of a small independent bookstore at sunset: floor-to-ceiling oak bookshelves on both side walls packed densely with hundreds of mixed paperback and hardcover books in earth tones, a rolling brass library ladder leaning against the left shelf, a black cat curled asleep on the third shelf from the bottom on the right wall, a single round Persian rug in deep maroon at center, a wooden reading chair with a knitted gray throw blanket on the left of the rug, a small side table with a half-empty cup of tea and a closed leather notebook on the right of the rug, golden afternoon light streaming horizontally through tall front windows at the back of the shot creating long shadows, a hand-painted wooden sign hanging above the front door visible at the far back reading 'Bramble & Vine Books', dust motes visible in the light beams.
eval_focus: rolling brass ladder on left shelf
black cat sleeping third shelf from bottom on right
wooden reading chair with gray knit throw on left of rug
side table tea cup leather notebook on right of rug
horizontal golden afternoon light back windows
vqa_questions: Is this a bookstore interior?
Are there floor-to-ceiling bookshelves?
Is there a rolling ladder?
Is there a black cat on a shelf?
Is there a Persian rug?
Is there a chair with a throw blanket?
Is there a tea cup on a side table?
Does the sign say 'Bramble & Vine Books'?
Is the light golden afternoon light?

items.prompt: A bird's-eye top-down photograph of a Japanese-style ramen bowl on a dark wooden table: the broth is a rich tonkotsu cream color, two soft-boiled eggs cut in half showing jammy yolks on the upper-left rim, three slices of chashu pork laid across the upper-right rim, a small handful of finely sliced green scallions sprinkled across the center, a single sheet of nori standing vertically at the bottom-left edge, a bamboo spoon resting on the right edge of the bowl handle pointing outward, chopsticks crossed at the upper edge of the table above the bowl, a small ceramic dish of red chili oil at the bottom-right of the frame, a folded indigo cloth napkin at the bottom-left of the frame.
eval_focus: nori sheet bottom-left edge of bowl
chopsticks crossed at top of table
vqa_questions: Is this a top-down view of a ramen bowl?
Are there two halved eggs?
Are there pork slices?
Are there scallions sprinkled?
Is there nori?
Are there chopsticks?
Is there a dish of chili oil?

items.prompt: A detailed isometric illustration of a small mountain hiking base camp at twilight: three orange dome tents arranged in a triangle around a central campfire with visible flames and a small column of gray smoke, a wooden picnic table on the right with three backpacks of different colors (red, blue, and dark green), a folded paper map and a metal coffee pot on the table, two wooden chopped-log seats next to the campfire, a tall pine tree at the top-left of the scene with a small lantern hanging from a low branch glowing warm yellow, three sleeping bags rolled neatly in front of one of the tents, a small dog (golden retriever) lying down between the tents and the campfire, a star-filled deep blue twilight sky background, soft snow patches on the ground.
eval_focus: three orange dome tents in triangle
picnic table with red, blue, dark green backpacks
map and coffee pot on table
pine tree top-left with hanging lantern
three rolled sleeping bags in front of one tent
golden retriever between tents and fire
vqa_questions: Is this an isometric illustration?
Are there three orange tents?
Is there a campfire?
Is there a picnic table with backpacks?
Are there three different colored backpacks?
Is there a dog?
Is the sky a starry twilight?

items.prompt: A photorealistic high-detail product shot of a vintage mechanical wristwatch laid face-up on a folded charcoal wool fabric background: round 38mm stainless steel case with a slightly worn brushed finish, white porcelain dial with small black Roman numerals at 12, 3, 6, and 9 only, black sword-shaped hour and minute hands, a thin red second hand, small subdial at 6 o'clock position showing the date '17', exposed crown on the right side at the 3 position with mild scratches, brown alligator leather strap with cream stitching, soft directional studio lighting from upper-left creating a clean specular highlight on the top of the case, no other props.
vqa_questions: Is this a vintage wristwatch?
Is the case stainless steel?
Are the numerals Roman and only at 12, 3, 6, 9?
Are the hands sword-shaped and black?
Is the second hand red?
Does the date subdial show 17?
Is the strap brown alligator with cream stitching?

items.prompt: A wide cinematic shot of a Mars-base laboratory interior: large curved panoramic window across the back wall showing the orange-red Martian landscape outside with two small habitat domes visible in the distance, four scientists in white pressurized suits without helmets working at four separate stations, the leftmost scientist examining a soil sample under a microscope, the second from left typing at a holographic display, the third from left holding a transparent tablet showing a green plant simulation, the rightmost scientist drinking water from a metal pouch, polished white floor reflecting the warm overhead LED panel lighting, a small autonomous wheeled robot rolling across the floor between stations carrying a tray of test tubes.
eval_focus: panoramic window with Martian landscape and two distant habitat domes
four scientists in white suits no helmets
third holding tablet with green plant
small wheeled robot carrying test tubes between stations
vqa_questions: Is this a Mars laboratory interior?
Is there a large window showing a Martian landscape?
Are there four scientists at four stations?
Is one using a microscope?
Is one looking at a holographic display?
Is one holding a tablet?
Is there a small wheeled robot?

items.prompt: A cozy hand-painted illustration of a witch's tea-time scene: a small wooden round table covered with a faded purple lace tablecloth, an ornate porcelain teapot with delicate floral patterns in the center of the table, two mismatched teacups (one chipped, one with a gold rim), a tiered cake stand with three layers (top: tiny tarts, middle: scones, bottom: finger sandwiches), a fluffy black cat curled in the witch's lap, the witch herself wearing a deep emerald green dress and a wide-brimmed pointed hat with a single moth pin, a tall stack of leather spellbooks on the right side of the table, a glowing crystal ball on the left side of the table with faint sparks inside, cozy warm window light from the right.
eval_focus: two mismatched cups (one chipped, one gold-rimmed)
emerald dress and pointed hat with moth pin
vqa_questions: Is this a hand-painted illustration of a witch?
Is there a teapot on the table?
Is there a tiered cake stand?
Is there a black cat?
Is the witch wearing green?
Is there a pointed hat?
Is there a crystal ball?
Is there a stack of books?

items.prompt: A documentary-style photograph of a busy New York street food cart at lunch rush: a steel-paneled halal-style cart on the corner with a yellow striped umbrella, the vendor (a middle-aged Bangladeshi man in a white apron and red baseball cap) handing a foil-wrapped sandwich to a customer in a navy business suit, a line of seven people of varied dress and demographics waiting behind, the cart's menu board on the front showing prices for chicken over rice and lamb gyro, steam rising from the cooking surface, yellow taxis blurred in the background, mid-afternoon overcast lighting.
eval_focus: Bangladeshi vendor white apron red cap
customer in navy suit receiving foil sandwich
vqa_questions: Is this a documentary photo of a street food cart?
Is the umbrella yellow striped?
Is the vendor wearing a red cap and white apron?
Is the customer in a navy suit?
Is there a line of people waiting?
Are yellow taxis visible in the background?
Is there a visible menu board?

items.prompt: A high-fantasy concept art piece of a floating sky castle: massive stone fortress with five tall spires of varying heights, the central spire taller than the rest and crowned with a glowing blue crystal, suspended in the sky on a giant chunk of inverted-pyramid rock with cascading waterfalls falling off the edges of the rock into a misty void below, dragons (specifically three smaller red ones and one large gold one) flying in formation around the castle, a long stone bridge extending from the castle's main gate out to a smaller cliff-edge waypoint, dusk lighting with orange and pink clouds, intricate banner flags flying from each spire.
eval_focus: central tallest spire with glowing blue crystal
three small red dragons and one large gold dragon
vqa_questions: Is this a fantasy floating castle?
Does it have multiple spires?
Is there a glowing crystal on the tallest spire?
Are there waterfalls falling from the rock base?
Are there dragons flying nearby?

items.prompt: A scientific cutaway illustration of a 12-room Antarctic research station shown as if the roof has been transparently lifted, top-down isometric, snow surrounding the building. The rooms are arranged in a 3-by-4 grid and contain, reading left-to-right then top-to-bottom: (1) bunkroom with four bunks, one person sleeping; (2) communal kitchen with a chef chopping vegetables and a long table set for ten; (3) communications room with three desks and large radio antennae visible through a porthole; (4) hydroponic greenhouse with rows of leafy greens under purple grow lights; (5) lab with a researcher peering into a microscope and a centrifuge spinning; (6) corridor with two researchers passing each other carrying clipboards; (7) generator room with two diesel generators and pipes in the ceiling; (8) shower/sauna with a tiled floor; (9) main entry airlock with red-hooded parkas hanging on hooks; (10) lounge with a chess board mid-game, two armchairs, a fireplace; (11) medical bay with an examination table and a wall chart; (12) storage room with metal shelves stacked with crates labeled 'FOOD WK 1', 'FOOD WK 2', 'TOOLS', 'SPARES'. Outside the building: a snowmobile parked by the entry, an antenna mast, a single penguin walking past. Daytime, low Antarctic sun casting long shadows pointing northwest. Cream-and-blue color scheme, technical-illustration style, no photorealism.
eval_focus: 3x4 grid of rooms with specific functions in specific positions
bunkroom, kitchen, comms, hydroponic greenhouse, lab, corridor, generator, shower/sauna, airlock, lounge, medical, storage in correct order
snowmobile, antenna mast, single penguin outside
vqa_questions: Is this a cutaway illustration?
Is it top-down isometric?
Are there multiple distinct rooms visible?
Is one room a kitchen?
Is one room a greenhouse with purple lighting?
Is there a lab room?
Are there crates with text labels?
Is there a penguin outside?
Is there a snowmobile outside?

items.prompt: A wide cinematic frame of a 1920s speakeasy at midnight, viewed from the back of the room looking toward the bar. The scene contains exactly: (a) a long brass-railed bar across the back with a bartender in a vest and bow tie shaking a cocktail in a silver shaker; (b) two patrons seated at the bar — on the left an older woman in a beaded silver flapper dress and a long cigarette holder, on the right a young man in a navy three-piece suit with his hat on the bar; (c) a four-piece jazz band on a small raised stage to the left of the bar — a Black male trumpet player standing center, a white female pianist seated at an upright, a Black male upright bassist, a white male drummer on a small kit; (d) three round tables in the foreground — leftmost with two women laughing one in a green dress one in burgundy, middle table empty but with two cocktail glasses and an ashtray with a still-smoking cigarette, rightmost with a dapper couple mid-conversation a small bouquet of red carnations between them; (e) a heavy red velvet curtain draped along the wall to the right; (f) a small chalkboard near the entrance behind the viewer's shoulder partially visible reading 'TONIGHT: THE ASTORIA FOUR'; (g) low warm amber lighting from wall sconces, smoke haze in the air; (h) art deco geometric brass details on the bar and ceiling moldings. Photorealistic period-accurate cinematography.
eval_focus: specific bar layout with bartender shaking cocktail
two specific bar patrons (silver flapper / navy 3-piece)
four-piece jazz band with specific roles and races/genders in specific positions
three foreground tables with specific occupants and props
vqa_questions: Is this a 1920s speakeasy?
Is there a long bar with a bartender?
Is there a jazz band on a small stage?
Are there four band members?
Are there round tables in the foreground?
Is one woman wearing a silver flapper dress?
Is there a red velvet curtain?
Does any visible chalkboard mention 'THE ASTORIA FOUR'?
Is the lighting warm and amber?

items.prompt: A high-angle photograph of a fully-staffed surgical operating theater mid-procedure containing exactly the following team in specific positions around the patient (who is fully draped except for the abdominal surgical field): (1) lead surgeon on the patient's right, masked, gowned in royal blue, holding a hemostat in her right hand, gloved hands in the surgical field; (2) assistant surgeon directly across from her on the patient's left, masked, holding a retractor; (3) scrub nurse to the lead surgeon's right at a Mayo stand of instruments laid out neatly; (4) circulating nurse standing back near the door in a different gown color (light teal) holding a clipboard; (5) anesthesiologist at the head of the patient seated, monitoring three vital-sign monitors mounted on a boom — one showing a clear ECG trace, one showing pulse-ox 98, one showing BP 118/72; (6) a resident observer in the corner with arms crossed, scrub cap visible. Sterile field with blue drapes, overhead surgical lights pointing inward, suction lines and electrosurgical cables visible. A clock high on the wall reading 09:42. Photorealistic, slight blur on the lead surgeon's hand to convey motion.
eval_focus: lead surgeon (female) in royal blue with hemostat on patient's right
scrub nurse at Mayo stand to surgeon's right
circulating nurse in light teal with clipboard near door
anesthesiologist seated at head with three monitors (ECG / SpO2=98 / BP=118/72)
resident observer in corner with arms crossed
motion blur on lead surgeon's hand
vqa_questions: Is this a surgical operating theater?
Are there multiple gowned team members?
Is there an anesthesiologist at the head of the patient?
Are there vital-sign monitors visible?
Do the monitors show numerical readouts?
Is one team member in a different gown color (teal vs blue)?
Is the wall clock showing approximately 9:42?
Are there sterile blue drapes?

items.prompt: A bird's-eye top-down photograph of a chef's prep counter in a fine-dining kitchen exactly 90 seconds before service. The counter must contain exactly: (a) twelve identical small white bowls arranged in a 3-by-4 grid, each containing a separate mise-en-place ingredient — top row left-to-right: minced shallot, micro basil, lemon zest, sea salt flakes; middle row: blanched green beans, halved cherry tomatoes, capers, finely chopped chives; bottom row: brunoise of carrot, brunoise of red bell pepper, kalamata olive halves, toasted pine nuts; (b) two long stainless squeeze bottles on the right side, one labeled 'BEURRE BLANC' the other labeled 'CHERVIL OIL'; (c) a 20-cm chef's knife laid diagonally across the upper-right corner of the counter, blade pointing away; (d) a folded clean white side towel on the lower-left corner; (e) a paper printed dupe in the upper-left corner reading 'TABLE 14 — 2 SCALLOP' in large block type; (f) a small handheld digital timer on the upper-center reading 1:30. Even soft overhead daylight, no shadows under the bowls, photorealistic flat-lay.
eval_focus: exactly 12 small white bowls in 3x4 grid
specific ingredients in specific bowls in specific positions
two labeled squeeze bottles (BEURRE BLANC / CHERVIL OIL) on right
20cm chef's knife diagonal upper-right blade pointing away
vqa_questions: Is this a top-down flat-lay?
Are there exactly twelve small bowls in a 3 by 4 grid?
Are there two squeeze bottles?
Is one bottle labeled with French sauce text?
Is there a chef's knife diagonally placed?
Is there a printed dupe with 'TABLE 14' visible?
Is there a small timer reading approximately 1:30?

items.prompt: A panoramic wide-format painting in detailed traditional Indian miniature style (Mughal court tradition) depicting a marketplace at sunset with at least sixteen named participants: (1) a fruit seller on the left under a striped red-and-cream awning weighing pomegranates on a balance scale; (2) a young customer in a saffron kurta pointing at the pomegranates; (3) a snake charmer center-left playing a been before a swaying cobra in a wicker basket, three children watching from a respectful distance; (4) a brassware vendor center with a pyramid of stacked pots; (5) a sadhu in orange robes seated cross-legged on a small woven mat near the brassware vendor, eyes closed in meditation; (6) two musicians right-of-center, one playing a tabla one playing a sitar, on a small raised platform; (7) a noblewoman on a richly caparisoned white elephant in the upper-right background being fanned by an attendant with a peacock-feather fan; (8) a stray dog drinking from a water bowl near the lower-right corner; (9) a small boy on the lower-left flying a red kite, with the kite string visible reaching up out of the frame; (10) the city's fort wall and minarets visible in the distant background. Vivid jewel tones — gold leaf accents, deep crimson, peacock blue, emerald green. Highly detailed faces, hand-painted feel, fine line work, no photorealism.
eval_focus: fruit seller with balance scale on left under striped awning
snake charmer with been and cobra basket, three children watching
brassware vendor with pyramid of pots
sadhu in orange robes seated cross-legged
noblewoman on caparisoned white elephant being fanned with peacock-feather fan upper-right
fort wall and minarets distant background
jewel-tone palette with gold leaf accents
vqa_questions: Does this look like a traditional Indian miniature painting?
Are there many figures in the scene?
Is there a fruit seller with a balance scale?
Is there a snake charmer with a cobra?
Is there a noblewoman on a white elephant?
Is there a small boy flying a kite?
Is the color palette rich with gold accents?
Does it have a hand-painted, non-photographic feel?

items.prompt: A medical-textbook-style fully-labeled cross-sectional anatomical illustration of the human respiratory system, drawn in clinical neutral colors over a faintly tinted cream background, with each major structure annotated with a thin leader line and a sans-serif label. Required labels in their correct anatomical positions: 'Nasal cavity', 'Oral cavity', 'Pharynx', 'Larynx', 'Trachea', 'Right primary bronchus', 'Left primary bronchus', 'Secondary bronchi', 'Bronchioles', 'Alveoli (inset detail)', 'Right lung (3 lobes)', 'Left lung (2 lobes)', 'Diaphragm', 'Pleural cavity'. The 'Alveoli (inset detail)' label must point to a circular zoomed-in inset on the right showing a small cluster of alveoli with two capillaries crossing one alveolus. The right lung must clearly show three distinct lobes; the left lung must clearly show two distinct lobes plus the cardiac notch. A horizontal title across the top reading 'Human Respiratory System — Anterior View'. Subtle anatomical accuracy — bronchial branching plausibly correct, diaphragm dome-shape correct. No watermarks, no signatures.
eval_focus: anatomical cross-section respiratory system, textbook clinical style

all required labels in correct positions: nasal/oral cavity, pharynx, larynx, trachea, R+L primary bronchi, secondary bronchi, bronchioles, alveoli inset, R lung 3 lobes, L lung 2 lobes, diaphragm, pleural cavity
inset detail for alveoli with capillaries crossing
left lung shows 2 lobes plus cardiac notch
title across top 'Human Respiratory System — Anterior View'
vqa_questions: Is this an anatomical illustration of the respiratory system?
Are there labels with leader lines?
Is the title 'Human Respiratory System — Anterior View' visible?
Does the right lung show three lobes?
Does the left lung show two lobes?
Is there an inset zoom for alveoli?
Is the diaphragm shown beneath the lungs?
Is the style clinical/textbook (not photographic)?

items.prompt: A photo-realistic wide-angle high-resolution photograph of a five-couple wedding-reception dinner scene in a glass-walled garden venue at twilight. Required elements: (a) a long banquet table seating exactly ten people across, with the bride (centered, white off-shoulder gown) and groom (centered, charcoal three-piece suit with a forest-green tie) at the head facing the camera; the eight other guests in named positions — the bride's mother (early 50s, deep emerald dress) immediately to her right, the groom's father (early 60s, navy suit) immediately to his left, four other guests further out; (b) place settings: each plate holds a different-stage entrée (some untouched, some half-eaten, two cleared with crumpled napkins), three different wine glasses per setting (water, white, red), gold flatware, a folded place card at every setting (none readable individually but all present); (c) a multi-tier wedding cake on a separate small round table to the left of the main table — exactly four tiers, white with cascading fresh peonies in cream and peach; (d) a string quartet in the background-right corner on a small platform playing visible instruments (2 violins, viola, cello); (e) overhead — a ceiling of suspended bistro lights and a few hanging glass orbs with tiny candles inside, all glowing warm; (f) outside the glass walls — a manicured garden with magnolia trees and one heron walking through the lawn; (g) lighting is the magic-hour warm-blue gradient where indoor warm tungsten meets outdoor blue-hour sky. Photo-real, slight bokeh on the background quartet, sharp focus on the bride and groom.
eval_focus: wedding reception in glass-walled garden venue twilight
long banquet table with exactly 10 seated
bride in white off-shoulder gown centered
groom in charcoal 3-piece with forest-green tie centered
bride's mother in emerald to bride's right
groom's father in navy to groom's left
three wine glasses per setting + gold flatware + folded place card
four-tier wedding cake on separate left table with peach/cream peonies
string quartet (2 violins, viola, cello) background-right on platform
bistro lights and hanging candle orbs overhead
magnolia trees outside, heron walking on lawn
bokeh on quartet, sharp focus on bride and groom
vqa_questions: Is this a wedding reception scene?
Is there a long banquet table with about ten people seated?
Is the bride centered in a white gown?
Is the groom in a dark suit with a green tie?
Is there a multi-tier wedding cake on a separate table?
Are there string quartet musicians in the background?
Is the venue glass-walled with garden visible outside?
Is there a heron walking on the lawn outside?
Is the lighting warm-tungsten transitioning to blue-hour outside?
